description: Your team lead at NOAA Coral Reef Watch has flagged potential mass bleaching conditions across multiple reef regions. As a marine biologist and coral reef ecosystem scientist, use your domain knowledge to identify thermally stressed reef regions and classify bleaching risk using Panoply and the sea surface temperature data in ~/PanoplyData/. Complete the assessment and deliver all required output files to the locations specified in ~/Desktop/reef_monitoring_request.txt.

metadata.occupation: Marine Biologist / Coral Reef Ecosystem Scientist
metadata.industry: Marine Conservation / NOAA Coral Reef Watch
